overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat walking through an urban park at night. The character strolls along a tree-lined promenade with autumn foliage, circles a large illuminated monument, and approaches a city street intersection.

events.description: character approaches a pedestrian standing in the pathway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved promenade lined with red autumn trees and park benches

notable_agents.action: person standing in the middle of the pathway facing the camera

entered.detail: trees with red and orange autumn foliage lining the promenade
metal and wood bench along the pathway
ornate black lamppost with multiple glowing globes
city buildings with illuminated windows visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide paved promenade at night, flanked by autumn trees with red foliage and vintage street lamps. Park benches line the right side of the path. The character approaches a pedestrian standing in the walkway ahead, with distant city buildings visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza with illuminated stone statue

events.description: exiting tree-lined path into open monument plaza with large stone structure
character begins circling around the base of the monument to view the statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the monument and walking around its base to view the illuminated statue from different angles

entered.detail: massive square stone pedestal with circular decorative elements
bronze statue of seated figures illuminated from below
modern building with distinctive green illuminated windows
large rectangular planter with trimmed bushes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza featuring a large illuminated monument with a statue on top. The character circles around the monument's base, revealing a modern building with green-lit windows on the right. The camera tilts upward to show the statue silhouetted against the night sky as the character walks around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza approaching street intersection with column monument

events.description: leaving monument plaza and approaching street intersection with tall column visible
character approaches crosswalk with stop sign and street visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking away from the monument toward a street intersection with a tall column monument in the distance

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone column with decorative top visible in the distance
red octagonal stop sign at the street corner
painted pedestrian crossing lines on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the monument plaza toward a street intersection. A tall column monument becomes visible in the distance, and the character approaches a crosswalk with a stop sign. The environment transitions from the plaza to the street edge, with the crosswalk and road becoming prominent in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet urban park at night that gradually transitions into a bustling city intersection. It begins with the character walking along a wide paved promenade flanked by red autumn foliage and vintage street lamps, passing park benches and a distant pedestrian. As the path opens into a plaza, the camera circles a large illuminated monument, tilting upward to reveal a statue silhouetted against the night sky while a modern building with green-lit windows emerges on the right. The scene then shifts away from the plaza toward the city edge, where a tall column monument appears in the distance. Finally, the environment transitions from the park greenery to the urban street, moving toward a crosswalk and stop sign as the road becomes prominent in the foreground.
